title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 490.260 - Records of religious societies
text:
490.260.  Records of religious societies. — When, by the ordinance or custom of any religious society or congregation in this state, a register is required to be kept of marriages, births, baptisms, deaths or interments, such register shall be admitted as evidence.
(RSMo 1939 § 1829) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1665; 1919 § 5352; 1909 § 6297
